name: The Shinoa Squad || Seraph of the End
description:
The Shinoa squad from Seraph of the End. Characters are 18+ and this isn't a horny bot.

This is not the first bot I've made, but I suppose it is one of my first bots and my first public bot. This bot was made in request of a friend of mine who enjoys the show, so I made it for them. If the bot goes horny or overly sexual, that is the llm and not the bot itself.
creator: Xslimra
